@@ -0,0 +1,77 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "notary-project-259-notation-sign-doesn-t-work-on-main-branch",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "notary-project: notation sign doesn't work on main branch",
+    "description": "notation sign doesn't work on main branch. Community-reported issue.",
+    "type": "troubleshoot",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Identify notary-project troubleshoot symptoms",
+        "description": "Check for the issue in your notary-project deployment:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n notary-project -l app.kubernetes.io/name=notary-project\nkubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=notary-project -n notary-project --tail=100 | grep -i error\n```\nLook for errors or warnings in the logs that may indicate the issue."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review notary-project configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant notary-project configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get all -n notary-project -l app.kubernetes.io/name=notary-project\nkubectl get configmap -n notary-project -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=notary-project\n```\n**Summary**\nnotation sign doesn't work on main branch\n\n- Build notation binary from main branch\n- Follow the flow in https://github.com/notaryproject/notation/blob/main/docs/hello-signing.md\n- Execute notation cert generate-test to create local keys"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for notation sign doesn't work on main branch",
+        "description": "Tested with the workflow mentioned in [hello-signing](https://github.com/notaryproject/notation/blob/main/docs/hello-signing.md)\n```yaml\nnotation sign --plain-http $IMAGE\nIncorrect Usage: flag provided but not defined: -plain-http\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Confirm notation sign doesn't work on main branch is resolved",
+        "description": "Verify the fix by checking that the original error no longer occurs:\n```bash\nkubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=notary-project -n notary-project --tail=50 --since=5m\nkubectl get events -n notary-project --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10\n```\nConfirm that the issue symptoms are gone."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "Tested with the workflow mentioned in [hello-signing](https://github.com/notaryproject/notation/blob/main/docs/hello-signing.md)",
+      "codeSnippets": [
+        "notation sign --plain-http $IMAGE\nIncorrect Usage: flag provided but not defined: -plain-http",
+        "notation cert generate-test --default \"yizha-test-certs\"\nnotation sign $IMAGE\n2022/07/22 17:05:20 certificate-chain is invalid, certificate chain must contain at least two certificates: a root and a leaf certificate",
+        "./notation --version\nnotation version v0.7.1-alpha.1+bb5b49728798376a518b522f1693cf29b0376fa6.unreleased\n\n$ ./notation sign --plain-http $IMAGE\nIncorrect Usage: flag provided but not defined: -plain-http"
+      ]
+    }
+  },
+  "metadata": {
+    "tags": [
+      "notary-project",
+      "incubating",
+      "security",
+      "troubleshoot"
+    ],

+      "notary-project"
+    ],

+    },

+  },
